internal_issues.description: VERDICT CATEGORY OVERLOAD: 'Misleading' verdict conflates 4 distinct failure modes. 23 WINs under one label. Subcategory restructuring needed.
internal_issues.rationale: Verdict taxonomy restructuring requires human editorial decision. Affects sitewide narrative framing — not patchable with find/replace. Remains pending-human.

internal_issues.description: WIN-004 claimed V51.0 concedes 'station ratio proxy method was methodologically invalid.' Phrase not found in V50.6 or V51.0 raw-text. Fabricated attribution.

suggested_patch.find: Note: V51.0 now acknowledges WIN-004's 'station ratio proxy method' was 'methodologically invalid.'
suggested_patch.rationale: False attribution removed. Neither phrase appears in any raw-text file.

internal_issues.description: WIN-012 Exhibit A rebuttal lacks statistical depth: no DOF correction for r=0.992 G5 storm autocorrelation, no null distribution for AI=1.152. Created from EXHIBIT-AB curmudgeon special review.
internal_issues.rationale: Assigned to analyst as EXP-030. Requires ~4-6 sentences of statistical argument. Not suitable for find/replace patch.

globe_fingerprint_update.finding: θ=−lonE is the defining identity of the azimuthal equidistant (AE) projection centered on North Pole. Both dome coordinate axes (radial=WGS84 latitude via H(r), angular=WGS84 longitude) are globe coordinates in disguise. The dome has no native coordinate system independent of WGS84.

recommended_actions.action: HUMAN DECISION: Dielectric section reinstatement (gravity-coupling cluster, ~1200 words). EXP-028 analysis is ready. The review's biggest content gap is that dome Exhibit A/B are prominently featured on the home page but not addressed in the published review. Un-parking the dielectric section would close this gap.

HUMAN DECISION: ISS-442 verdict taxonomy — 'Misleading' conflates 4 failure modes. Consider whether 'Non-Discriminating' subcategory or reclassification to 'Std Model Explains' is appropriate for non-discriminating WINs.
WATCH: April 9 dome reset window expires tomorrow. Monitor for post-window claims, score updates, or V52.0 announcement.
ANALYST: EXP-029 (WIN-002 reconciliation) and EXP-030 (WIN-012 statistical analysis) are pending. Analyst should pick these up on next run.
